governance.permitted_use: Research and benchmarking; private use only.
governance.redistribution_rights: Official ECOSTRESS page requests citation and states copyright/all rights reserved; converted matrices are private/internal until redistribution rights are clarified.

diagnostics.interpretation: Rupture aux jonctions de détecteurs, calibration locale ou sonde différente.
diagnostics.label: Splice / raccord détecteurs

diagnostics.interpretation: Variété, espèce, lot ou condition différente mais physiquement plausible.
diagnostics.label: Spectre hors domaine valide

diagnostics.interpretation: Combinaison possible changement de sonde + splice, amplifiée par géométrie, fond ou calibration.
diagnostics.label: Signature VERA25-like

diagnostics.interpretation: Artefacts numériques ou traitement spectral incorrect.
diagnostics.label: Erreur interpolation / rééchantillonnage

diagnostics.interpretation: Mélange de campagnes, opérateurs, lots, setups ou sous-populations spectrales.
diagnostics.label: Dataset multi-régimes

diagnostics.interpretation: Décalage systématique entre campagnes, instruments ou référence blanche.
diagnostics.label: Erreur calibration / référence blanche

diagnostics.interpretation: Modification de l'illumination, collecte, angle ou distance sonde-échantillon.
diagnostics.label: Différence de sonde / géométrie

diagnostics.interpretation: Effet systématique du support, blanc/noir, transflectance ou environnement de mesure.
diagnostics.label: Fond différent

top_classes.name: Spectra obtained from the Noncoventional Exploitation FactorsData System of the National Photographic Interpretation Center.
Smooth-faced red building construction brick. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.construction.brick.solid.0097uuu.spectrum.txt
General fabrication construction brick. Brick was smooth, weathered, and red in color. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.construction.brick.solid.0412uuu.spectrum.txt
General fabrication construction brick. Brick surface was smooth, bare, and red in color. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.construction.brick.solid.0413uuu.spectrum.txt
Black, ashen construction cinders from a railroad bed in Rome, NY. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.construction.cinder.solid.0101uuu.spectrum.txt

A single coat of olive green alkyd gloss paint, on an aluminum surface. The paint is non-photochemically reactive. From the Great Life series by Martin Senour Paints. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.construction.paint.solid.0385uuu.spectrum.txt

Two coats of olive green alkyd gloss paint on an aluminum surface. The paint is non-photochemically reactive. From the Great Life series by Martin Senour Paints. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.construction.paint.solid.0386uuu.spectrum.txt

A smooth, slightly translucent coat of alkyd gloss paint on construction lumber (pine wood). Note cellulose spectral features. Olive green paint is from the Great Life series by Martin Senour Paints. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.construction.paint.solid.0407uuu.spectrum.txt

Two smooth coats of alkyd gloss paint on construction lumber (pine wood). Paint coating was slightly translucent. Olive green paint from the Great Life series by Martin Senour Paints. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.construction.paint.solid.0408uuu.spectrum.txt
General construction pine wood lumber. Sample was bare and weathered. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.construction.wood.solid.0404uuu.spectrum.txt

Road Asphalts and Tar. Weathered runway construction asphalt. Sample was black with little aggregate showing. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.asphalt.paving.solid.0674uuu.spectrum.txt

Bare aluminum metal that is weathered and scratched/scored. From electronics, roofings, switch covers. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.roofing.metal.solid.0384uuu.spectrum.txt
Weathered, galvanized steel from roof and vent covers. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.roofing.metal.solid.0525uuua.spectrum.txt
Galvanized steel from roof and vent covers. Sample was weathered. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.roofing.metal.solid.0525uuub.spectrum.txt
Weathered, galvanized bare steel from roof and vent covers. Sample was completely oxidized. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.roofing.metal.solid.0526uuu.spectrum.txt
Slightly weathered bare copper metal from government building roof flashing. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.roofing.metal.solid.0681uuu.spectrum.txt
Ten year old copper metal from building roof flashing. Sample was weathered and bare. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.roofing.metal.solid.0682uuu.spectrum.txt
Extremely weathered bare copper metal from government building roof flashing. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.roofing.metal.solid.0692uuu.spectrum.txt
Extremely weathered black roofing paper. Paper was thickly tarred and deeply cracked. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.roofing.paper.solid.0522uuu.spectrum.txt
Unweathered, black roofing paper, thickly tarred. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.roofing.paper.solid.0523uuu.spectrum.txt
Weathered asphalt roofing shingle. Sample was reddish and granule-covered. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.roofing.shingle.solid.0672uuu.spectrum.txt
